data.body: Tier D COMPLETE & RETIRED (2026-06-12). Ported -> flipped -> soaked -> retired the bash write/sync core into rebar._store (lock/event_append/push/sync). ONE unified fcntl+mkdir lock across seam/ticket_txn/compaction/reconciler (stiff-mop-lane fixed). Deleted bash core + ticket-append-event.sh + rebar._switch (last kill-switch) + bash-internal suites (~5,240 LOC net). Kept mkdir leg for mixed-version-fleet safety (drop deferred to full-ecosystem migration). Fixed an async-push child-import bug surfaced by retirement. Verify: full non-integration suite 1555/0; probe 141/141 isolated+live; storm/claim-storm/concurrency-regression/push-policy green; fsck clean. Commits 57114212 (port), be3cdd7e (flip), 6f3d8784 (retire).
